name: batch-http
description: Make multiple HTTP requests (body/headers/summary) in one call, collapsing 3+ sequential curl calls into 1 step.

parameters.name: --headers
parameters.description: Show response headers instead of body

parameters.name: --summary
parameters.description: Show HTTP status, final URL, and redirect count summary

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces 3+ separate curl calls (headers + code + redirects) with 1 step, saving 2+ agent steps per HTTP check batch.
